message:
refactor(test): inline format args in bench schema and add mutex poison recovery tests

bench_schema.rs: Replace format!("...{:?}", var) with format!("...{var:?}")
inline capture syntax in two error messages, satisfying the
uninlined_format_args clippy lint.

perf_regression.rs: Extract mutex recovery into a generic
recover_poisoned_mutex_guard() that also calls clear_poison() after
recovering, preventing repeated poison warnings on subsequent lock
acquisitions. perf_guard() now delegates to this helper.

New tests:
- recover_poisoned_mutex_guard_clears_poison_state: intentionally
  poisons a mutex, recovers, verifies poison is cleared
- recover_poisoned_mutex_guard_handles_clean_lock: verifies clean
  locks pass through without side effects

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
